filesystem.description: Read-only access to this project directory. Use for exploring demo files without needing Bash.

github.description: GitHub API access for searching Anthropic SDK examples, issues, and release notes. Token via ${GITHUB_TOKEN} env var — never hardcode.

brave-search.description: Web search for Claude documentation, exam resources, and Anthropic blog posts. API key via ${BRAVE_API_KEY} env var.
